mapper.select: select count(A.DM_ID) as dataModelCnt ,sum(COALESCE(B.OBJ_CNT,0)) as objCnt ,sum(COALESCE(B.ATTR_CNT,0)) as attrCnt ,ROUND(avg(COALESCE(B.TOTAL_STND_RATE,0)),2) as totalStndRate ,ROUND(avg(COALESCE(B.TERMS_STND_RATE,0)),2) as termsStndRate ,ROUND(avg(COALESCE(B.WORD_STND_RATE,0)),2) as wordStndRate ,ROUND(avg(COALESCE(B.DOMAIN_STND_RATE,0)),2) as domainStndRate from TB_DATA_MODEL A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( select S.DM_ID, S.OBJ_CNT, S.ATTR_CNT, T.DM_CLCT_ID ,(S.TERMS_STND_RATE+S.WORD_STND_RATE+S.DOMAIN_STND_RATE)/3::NUMERIC as TOTAL_STND_RATE ,S.TERMS_STND_RATE, S.WORD_STND_RATE, S.DOMAIN_STND_RATE, T.CLCT_END_DT as CLCT_DT from TB_DATA_MODEL_STATS S, TB_DATA_MODEL_CLCT T where S.DM_CLCT_ID = T.DM_CLCT_ID and T.CLCT_END_DT = (select max(CLCT_END_DT) from TB_DATA_MODEL_CLCT where DM_ID = S.DM_ID) ) B on A.DM_ID = B.DM_ID where A.USE_YN = 'Y'

select distinct A.DM_NM as dataModelNm ,ROUND(COALESCE(B.TOTAL_STND_RATE,0),2) as totalStndRate ,COALESCE(B.TERMS_STND_RATE,0) as termsStndRate ,COALESCE(B.WORD_STND_RATE,0) as wordStndRate ,COALESCE(B.DOMAIN_STND_RATE,0) as domainStndRate from TB_DATA_MODEL A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( select S.DM_ID, S.OBJ_CNT, S.ATTR_CNT, T.DM_CLCT_ID ,(S.TERMS_STND_RATE+S.WORD_STND_RATE+S.DOMAIN_STND_RATE)/3::NUMERIC as TOTAL_STND_RATE ,S.TERMS_STND_RATE, S.WORD_STND_RATE, S.DOMAIN_STND_RATE, T.CLCT_END_DT as CLCT_DT from TB_DATA_MODEL_STATS S, TB_DATA_MODEL_CLCT T where S.DM_CLCT_ID = T.DM_CLCT_ID and T.CLCT_END_DT = (select max(CLCT_END_DT) from TB_DATA_MODEL_CLCT where DM_ID = S.DM_ID) ) B on A.DM_ID = B.DM_ID where A.USE_YN = 'Y' order by totalStndRate desc limit 10
